dc_description: A forward-facing view from a two-wheeled vehicle on a narrow rural paved road. The vehicle’s handlebar and central instrument area are blurred in the foreground. The road extends straight ahead with worn asphalt patches and a pale shoulder. Tall green grass and crops line the right side, while shrubs, a leafless tree, and distant low vegetation line the left. A blue road sign stands ahead on the right side of the road. The sky is mostly clear and pale blue, with slight haze near the horizon.
novel_visual_observations: Several dark circular spots are visible across the sky area, likely on the camera lens or windshield. The road surface shows irregular dark repair patches concentrated along the lane.
rich_context: Via Cassia, Acquapendente, Viterbo, Lazio, 01021, Italia
